metadata.title: We Dream Of End
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Rejoice! We Were Placed Here To Suffer
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Before Agony, There Was...
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Air Has Turned Bitter; We Walk Until Sunlight Dies
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Go On, Through The Depths Of Abjecation
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - From Rot We Rose; To Decay We Return
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Choke On Nothing; We Dream Of End
